name: hud_ui_text_label_update_text_extents
description: HudUiTextLabel::UpdateTextExtents centers the label x position within its bounds and rebuilds clip bounds when a blit source is present.
known_limits: Depends on MeasureTextWidth and RebuildTextBounds, which are functionally accepted but remain binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?UpdateTextExtents@HudUiTextLabel@@QAEXXZ at 0x4bcdf0 still fails: 10 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 3 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 61 bytes and the VC object symbol is 64 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows MeasureTextWidth, centered x calculation from center bounds, and conditional clipRect/RebuildTextBounds work when bltSource is non-null.
The native text-label smoke validates centered x and rebuilt clip rectangle for a measured two-glyph string.
